description: Clean prompts express positive sentiment. Corrupted prompts express matched negative sentiment with minimal changes.

prompt_pairs.clean: I love this movie because it is
prompt_pairs.corrupted: I hate this movie because it is

prompt_pairs.clean: The food was delicious and the service was
prompt_pairs.corrupted: The food was disgusting and the service was

prompt_pairs.clean: I enjoyed this book because it was
prompt_pairs.corrupted: I disliked this book because it was

prompt_pairs.clean: The hotel experience was pleasant and the room was
prompt_pairs.corrupted: The hotel experience was unpleasant and the room was

prompt_pairs.clean: I really liked this game because it was
prompt_pairs.corrupted: I really hated this game because it was
